title: Async Job Problem Details Extensions
description: Extension members for RFC 9457 Problem Details objects that describe asynchronous job outcomes. See draft-ratnawat-httpapi-async-problem-details-00.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the async job.

jobStatus.description: Current state of the async job. Registered values are ACCEPTED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED, TIMED_OUT, and COMPLETED_WITH_ERRORS. Servers MAY define additional values per Section 4.3.

submittedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC) when the job was accepted for processing.

completedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC) when the job reached a terminal state.

retryable.description: Whether the client should retry the job with the same input.

retryAfter.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Only meaningful when retryable is true.

processingStage.description: The pipeline stage at which the failure occurred.

correlationId.description: Client-supplied correlation identifier from the originating request.

retryable.description: Whether this item can be retried.

processingStage.description: Stage at which this item failed.
